scripts.dev: pnpm gen-manifest && wrangler pages dev public
scripts.gen-manifest: mkdir -p public/data && rm -f public/data/*.json && cp data/*.json public/data/ && ls -1 data/*.json | xargs -n1 basename | sed 's/\.json//' | jq -R . | jq -s . > public/data/manifest.json
scripts.deploy: pnpm build && wrangler pages deploy public
